mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.code, d.name, d.description, d.logo, d.visibility_policy_codes, d.registration_enabled, d.invitation_enabled, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at, d.created_by, d.updated_by, uc.username AS creator_name, uu.username AS updater_name FROM business_domain d LEFT JOIN user_account uc ON uc.id = d.created_by LEFT JOIN user_account uu ON uu.id = d.updated_by
ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.id, d.code, d.name, d.logo FROM business_domain d
d.status = 1
AND (d.code LIKE #{keyword} OR d.name LIKE #{keyword})
ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business_domain d
d.status = 1
AND (d.code LIKE #{keyword} OR d.name LIKE #{keyword})

SELECT d.id, d.code, d.name, d.description, d.logo, d.visibility_policy_codes, d.registration_enabled, d.invitation_enabled, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at, d.created_by, d.updated_by, uc.username AS creator_name, uu.username AS updater_name FROM business_domain d LEFT JOIN user_account uc ON uc.id = d.created_by LEFT JOIN user_account uu ON uu.id = d.updated_by WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM business_domain WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE business_domain SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, logo = #{logo}, visibility_policy = #{visibilityPolicy}, visibility_policy_codes = #{visibilityPolicyCodes}, registration_enabled = #{registrationEnabled}, invitation_enabled = #{invitationEnabled}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
